# Requirements for the 'rl' conda environment (GRPO capability RL via rLLM/VERL)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Install order matters — see scripts/setup/setup_rl.sh for the full procedure.
#
# Step 1: verl[vllm] installed editable from submodule (brings torch, vllm, transformers,
#          accelerate, ray, hydra-core, datasets, peft, etc.)
# Step 2: This file covers deps not already satisfied by verl[vllm].
# Step 3: flash-attn installed separately with --no-build-isolation (needs torch at build time).

# --- rLLM transitive deps (imported by rLLM's init chain) ---
openai>=1.30                 # rllm.engine uses openai.types.Completion
vertexai                     # rllm.utils imports vertexai
sentence-transformers>=5.0   # rllm.utils imports SentenceTransformer
polars>=1.0                  # rllm.data.dataset imports polars
torchmetrics                 # rllm.rewards
dm-tree                      # rllm internals
fire                         # rllm CLI
gdown                        # rllm data download
tabulate                     # rllm logging
sortedcontainers             # rllm internals
PyMuPDF                      # rllm document parsing
together                     # rllm inference backend
gym>=0.26                    # rllm environments
firecrawl-py                 # rllm web environments

# --- Training infrastructure ---
deepspeed>=0.16              # FSDP / ZeRO for distributed training

# --- Reward computation ---
scikit-learn>=1.5            # TF-IDF cosine similarity for intercode reward

# --- Container runtime ---
udocker>=1.3                 # Unprivileged container execution (no Docker daemon)

# --- Logging & experiment tracking ---
wandb>=0.19

# --- terminal-bench-rl project deps (minus terminal-bench itself) ---
pydantic>=2.11
pyyaml>=6.0
litellm>=1.72                # LLM judge reward backend
